comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration 11: removed the remaining dream-runner memory/dream_finish ToolDefinition casts by widening createMemoryToolDefinition/createDreamFinishToolForSubagent to plain ToolDefinition and dropping the worker-side memory cast. Remaining adapter-boundary ToolDefinition casts still exist in agent worker for apply_patch/backlog/exa/thread tools.
